expectations.text: 2.1 PSU tag is unused in vanilla and mod
2.2 country_definitions defines PSU with tier=hegemony, capital=STATE_MOSCOW, all 10 Slavic cultures
expectations.evidence: Delta lists all 10 (russian, ukrainian, byelorussian, polish, czech, slovak, serb, croat, slovene, bulgarian) with tier = hegemony, capital = STATE_MOSCOW.

expectations.text: 2.3 Each of the 10 cultures exists in vanilla (byelorussian not belarusian)
expectations.evidence: Subagent used 'byelorussian' (vanilla form) — matches mod convention. SUMMARY explicitly flags this.

is_major_formation = yes, unification_play = dp_unify_pan_slavic_union, leadership_play = dp_leadership_pan_slavic_union, max_num_formation_candidates = 3, can_be_formation_candidate guards rank ≥ major_power.
Both has_technology_researched = present in possible block.

expectations.text: 2.6 dp_unify_pan_slavic_union exists with war_goal=unification, vanilla unification.dds
expectations.evidence: Confirmed verbatim, possible block requires decolonization + pan-nationalism.
Default, communist, fascist, generic monarchy (priority 0), Russian-led monarchy (priority 5), Orthodox theocracy (priority 5), technocracy — all 7.

expectations.text: 2.9 Russian-led monarchy uses was_formed_from = RUS OR ruler.has_culture = cu:russian, priority 5+
expectations.evidence: Trigger uses OR { was_formed_from = RUS, ruler ?= { has_culture = cu:russian } } at priority 5.

expectations.text: 2.10 Each dynamic name has is_main_tag_only = yes
2.12 Localization has all dp_*, dyn_c_*, PSU, PSU_ADJ
expectations.evidence: Loc delta: PSU, PSU_ADJ, 9 dyn_c_* keys (some adjectives shared), 6 dp_* keys (3 each for unify and leadership).
SUMMARY confirms; subagent followed mod convention.

judgment_calls: Defined custom geographic_region_pan_slavic (60 states across Slavic homelands) instead of using vanilla geographic_region_europe. Trade-off documented — avoids forcing the unifier to control half of Iberia/France/Britain. Strong, defensible call. All 25 spot-checked states verified in vanilla.
overall: PASS — all 15 assertions met. The custom geographic_region judgment is a meaningful improvement over a literal reading of the spec.
